name: dynamic-workflows-for-codex
description: Dynamic workflow runtime with Codex CLI planning, run status inspection, human approval gates, bootstrap, doctor checks, and skill routing.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and route Codex dynamic workflows.
interface.longDescription: Packages a Codex skill wrapper that bootstraps the repo-local plugin marketplace, runs cdw doctor readiness checks, routes dynamic planning and real workers through the user's codex-cli login, exposes run status inspection for resumable workflows, enforces human approval gates for guarded stages, and delegates review, debugging, workflow specs, staged runs, resume, and guarded migrations to the cdw external runtime.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this clone for Codex dynamic workflows.
Run cdw doctor for this clone.
Create a dynamic workflow spec with Codex CLI.
Resume a workflow after human approval.
Review this branch with dynamic workflows.
Debug this flaky test with cdw.
Create and run a reusable workflow spec.
